snapshots.description: Profile card render on web — avatar, username + premium badge, and the empty edit form inputs in their initial (pre-edit) state. Bound to the @ui-only branch of the matrix that ALSO carries @desktop/@responsive so the snapshot only fires on web (the mobile-only `profile_form_labels` snapshot covers the equivalent native render).

Translated form labels region — fullName / phone / address / notes labels rendered in the active market language. Mobile-only because the labels live in the locator file under the `mobile` key only (web uses placeholder text on the inputs). Captured via the fullName input as the region anchor — the label sits immediately above it.

Profile after a successful save and reload — values persisted, save button at rest. Tagged so it only matches the persistence scenario (which lacks @ui-only); the card-render and form-label snapshots above cover the pre-update render path.
